name: funding_rate_reversion_v1_grid
description: Funding Rate Reversion v1 — parameter search with simulated constant funding rate via env var. Edge: Bybit funding extremes → mean reversion SHORT/LONG. This backtest simulates a scenario where funding is always at threshold (i.e., tests SL/TP/RSI/EMA parameters assuming signal fires). Use historical funding rate data (scripts/funding_rate_fetcher.py --history) for realistic replay once data is downloaded.
_backtest_limitation: FR_LATEST_* env vars inject a fixed constant funding rate for all bars. This means the strategy always sees an 'extreme' rate — the RSI/EMA/price-extension filters do the real work of gating entries. Real-world signals will be rarer (only at actual 8h funding windows with extreme rates). Treat this backtest as a parameter search for the entry/exit logic, not as a frequency estimate.
_realistic_backtest: For realistic frequency: download historical funding rates with 'python3 scripts/funding_rate_fetcher.py --history --symbol BTCUSDT --days 360 --out data/funding_rates/BTCUSDT.csv', then replay will inject correct rates at each 8h window.
_goal: Find RSI/EMA/SL/TP combo with PF≥1.6, trades≥15, DD≤5%. Then run realistic replay with historical funding rate CSV.
